allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\Ricardo\\Desktop\\Encontratodo_FINAL_multi_landing_admin_inline_checkout_v2\\frontend\\src\\landings\\LuxCoveLED\\LuxCoveLED.jsx" -Raw; $cssStart = $content.IndexOf\('<style>'\); $cssEnd = $content.IndexOf\('</style>', $cssStart\); if \($cssStart -gt 0 -and $cssEnd -gt 0\) { $css = $content.Substring\($cssStart, $cssEnd - $cssStart + 8\); $css -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern "led-test|led-review" | Select-Object -First 40 } else { "CSS section not found" })
